name: Avulose Podi
description: A timeless classic from the heart of Kerala! Avulose Podi is a meticulously roasted blend of fine rice flour and freshly grated coconut seasoned with a hint of cumin and cardamom. Perfectly crunchy with an earthy aroma it can be enjoyed as a tea-time snack mixed with sugar and plantains or simply by itself. Handcrafted in small batches to preserve the authentic heritage flavor.
ingredients: Roasted Rice, Coconut, Cumin, Cardamom, Salt

name: Ari Unda
description: Perfectly round roasted rice balls mixed with dark jaggery and coconut. These sweet spheres are packed with energy and offer a deeply satisfying chewy texture.
ingredients: Roasted Rice flour, Jaggery, Grated Coconut, Cardamom

name: Achappam
description: Delicate golden-yellow Rose Cookies made from a blend of rice flour and coconut milk. Their intricate floral lace patterns are crisp and sharp offering a highly satisfying brittle crunch.
ingredients: Rice Flour, Coconut Milk, Sugar, Eggs, Black Sesame Seeds

name: Banana Chips
description: Thin vibrant yellow Banana Chips fried in pure coconut oil. Sliced from Kerala Nendran bananas these chips are perfectly crisp and lightly salted for an authentic taste.
ingredients: Nendran Bananas, Coconut Oil, Turmeric, Salt

name: Unniyappam
description: A cluster of warm Unniyappams - small round deep-fried snacks made from rice jaggery and ripe banana. They have a dark caramel color with a slightly porous spongy exterior.
ingredients: Rice Flour, Jaggery, Banana, Ghee, Coconut pieces, Cardamom

name: Murukku
description: Classic savory Murukku spiraled and crunchy made from a blend of rice and urad dal flour. Sprinkled with tiny black sesame seeds for an extra kick of flavor.
ingredients: Rice Flour, Urad Dal Flour, Butter, Sesame Seeds, Cumin, Salt
